name: Scrambled Eggs
recipeIngredient: 3 oz fat-free cheese, grated or diced
recipeInstructions:
1. Saute the chopped onion and mushrooms in the mixture of balsamic vinegar and water until they become soft and the liquid has mostly cooked away.
2. Combine salt, pepper, dried tarragon with egg replacers. Mix well.
3. Add the onion/mushrooms mixture to the egg replacer mixture.
4. Add grated or diced fat-free cheese and stir into the eggs.
5. Scramble until set.
Note: A non-stick skillet is essential for this recipe. The tarragon pairs well with eggs and adds a nice flavor. While there are many variations possible, using tarragon works particularly well.
